sentence: 小学三年级开始学习乘法和除法。
pinyin: Xiǎoxué sān niánjí kāishǐ xuéxí chéngfǎ hé chúfǎ.
english: Third graders begin learning multiplication and division.

sentence: 义务教育阶段的学费是免费的。
pinyin: Yì wù jiào yù jiēduàn de xuéfèi shì miǎnfèi de.
english: Tuition is free during the compulsory education years.

sentence: 从台北车站搭捷运去故宫很方便。
pinyin: Cóng Táiběi chēzhàn dā jié yùn qù Gùgōng hěn fāngbiàn.
english: Taking the MRT from Taipei Main Station to the Palace Museum is very convenient.

meaning: early education (abbr. for 早期教育[zao3 qi1 jiao4 yu4])
sentence: 她每周带孩子去上两次早教课。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu dài háizi qù shàng liǎng cì zǎo jiào kè.
english: She takes her child to early education classes twice a week.

meaning: to attach sb's name to (a role); to go by the title of; nominal; in na
sentence: 他只是挂名顾问，平时不管事。
pinyin: Tā zhǐshì guà míng gùwèn, píngshí bù guǎn shì.
english: He's just a nominal adviser—he doesn't actually handle anything.
